site_tagline: Install, diagnose, and repair HUBzero Forge services as Apache drop-ins.
site_description: Documentation for hzforge: one tool that installs, uninstalls, diagnoses, and repairs HUBzero per-tool Subversion, Git, gitExternal, and Trac services as self-contained Apache drop-ins — independent of the m4 vhost template.

groups.title: Overview
groups.summary: What hzforge is and why it works the way it does.

groups.title: Reference
groups.summary: How the drop-ins are wired, and the four Forge services.

groups.title: Operations
groups.summary: Prerequisites, command reference, manual install, and the mod_python → mod_wsgi migration.
